title: referrals — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families. Tenant-level for admin dashboards; user-level for a user's own referral + reward stream; program-level for real-time reward materialization visibility on the program-detail screen. Reverb (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.referrals
channels.description: Tenant-wide referral + reward + fraud-flag stream. Sink for admin dashboards.
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Fraud flag payloads carry severity + flag_type but NOT the underlying evidence hashes.

channels.name: user.{userId}.referrals
channels.description: Per-user referral stream. Powers the /me/referrals live-updates widget in the user dashboard. Fires when the user is either the referrer OR the recipient.
events: ReferralVested (where referrer_id = userId OR referred_id = userId)
ReferralCancelled (where referrer_id = userId OR referred_id = userId)
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to what the user needs to render their dashboard row. Never carries other users' identifying data.

channels.name: referral-program.{programId}.rewards
channels.description: Program-scoped reward + referral stream. Powers the program-detail analytics screen's real-time counter (referrals in-flight, rewards issued, rewards paid, budget consumed).
channels.notes: Aggregate counters only — no per-user identifying data. Powers the ceiling counters on the program-detail dashboard.
